name: pdd-entropy-reduction
description: Continuously monitor and reduce technical debt to prevent system decay through code cleanup, doc updates, and architecture alignment. Trigger this Skill when detecting AI residue, architecture drift, needing refactoring, or debt audit tasks. 支持中文触发：熵减、技术债务、代码清理、垃圾回收、架构对齐、重构建议。
